name: Minesweeper Classy
short_description: A modern and stylish take on a classic logic puzzle game. Play the classic minesweeper levels, beat unique level layouts and challenges, or create and share your own level designs. Features a ton of customization options.
detailed_description:
I have always loved minesweeper puzzle games and decided to make my version of it, a stylish and smooth play experience.

Features:
- Play classic minesweeper: beginner, intermediate, expert and expert large!
- 48 different Classy levels with unique layouts to beat.
- Classic Minesweeper colored numbers available if you prefer those!
- Improve your best times.
- Dark mode available!
- Unlock different stylish color palettes, in addition to dark/light mode and classy or classic colored numbers.
- NEW! Create your own custom palette! Can be shared or copied from others.
- Various settings to customize the game.
- leaderboards for classic boards.
- Level editor: create your own levels to share, copy levels other players have made with a share code!
